name: Gabelli Utility Trust (The) 5.375% Series C Cumulative Preferred Shares
summary: The Gabelli Utility Trust 5.375% Series C Cumulative Preferred Shares are preferred shares issued by The Gabelli Utility Trust. The trust is a closed-end management investment company focused on high total return through dividends and capital appreciation, primarily in the utility sector. The preferred shares offer a fixed dividend rate.
